  "title": "Assistant Cashier",
  "description": "Macden Communications Limited is into the sales, supply and distribution of beverages and is a major distributor for International Breweries PLC, Nigerian Breweries Limited and Guiness Nigerian Limited.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Cashier

Job Location: Sango Ota, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time
Working days and time: 8am to 6pm and from Mondays to Saturdays and Public Holidays

Responsibilities


	Transaction Processing
	Cash Reconciliation
	Customer Service
	Accuracy in daily financial records
	Manage cash flow


Requirements


	Applicants should have a Degree in Accounting with 1-3 years of experience as a cashier&nbsp;
	Interested applicants should be resident within Ogun state particularly within Sango Ota axis.


Salary
N75,000 - N80,000 monthly (Based on experience).

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: patricia_asemota@yahoo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Assistant Cashier Job at Macden Communications Limited




        
    

        
        Macden Communications Limited is into the sales, supply and distribution of beverages and is a major distributor for International Breweries PLC, Nigerian Breweries Limited and Guiness Nigerian Limited.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Cashier

Job Location: Sango Ota, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time
Working days and time: 8am to 6pm and from Mondays to Saturdays and Public Holidays

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Transaction Processing
	Cash Reconciliation
	Customer Service
	Accuracy in daily financial records
	Manage cash flow


Requirements


	Applicants should have a Degree in Accounting with 1-3 years of experience as a cashier 
	Interested applicants should be resident within Ogun state particularly within Sango Ota axis.


Salary
N75,000 - N80,000 monthly (Based on experience).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "E-commerce Operations Manager",
  "description": "Valuemart is a dynamic&nbsp;retail and hospitality company committed to delivering exceptional customer experiences through quality products, excellent service, and innovative business solutions. With operations spanning retail, bakery, restaurant, and caf&eacute; services, we pride ourselves on creating value for our customers, empowering our employees, and contributing positively to the communities we serve.&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;E-commerce Operations Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Manage the end-to-end operations of the company&#39;s e-commerce platforms and online marketplaces.
	Oversee both front-end and back-end e-commerce operations, ensuring platform availability, functionality, and performance.
	Work closely with developers and third-party vendors on system enhancements, integrations, and troubleshooting.
	Manage integrations between the e-commerce platform, ERP, POS, Inventory Management System (IMS), Order Management System (OMS), payment gateways, and logistics partners.
	Monitor website performance, user experience, and system uptime, and recommend improvements.
	Lead order management, fulfilment, inventory synchronization, payment reconciliation, and returns management.
	Analyse operational and sales data to improve business performance and customer satisfaction.
	Develop and implement Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for e-commerce operations.
	Ensure data accuracy, cybersecurity best practices, and compliance with company policies.
	Lead, coach, and develop the e-commerce team to achieve operational and commercial objectives


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Information Technology, Computer Science, Supply Chain Management, Marketing, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in e-commerce operations, with at least 2 years in a managerial or supervisory role.
	Proven experience managing end-to-end e-commerce operations, including order fulfilment, inventory management, customer experience, and marketplace operations.
	Hands-on experience managing e-commerce platforms such as Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, BigCommerce, or similar, including product uploads, catalogue management, pricing updates, promotions, and content management.
	Experience working with or supporting the integration of e-commerce platforms with ERP, POS, payment gateways, logistics providers, and inventory management systems.
	Good understanding of website content management and basic web technologies (HTML, CSS) and familiarity with APIs and system integrations. Knowledge of JavaScript or SQL is an added advantage but not required.
	Ability to work effectively with IT teams, software developers, and third-party vendors to implement, maintain, and enhance e-commerce solutions.
	Strong analytical skills with experience using reporting tools such as Google Analytics, Power BI, Excel, or similar.
	Excellent leadership, project management, communication, and problem-solving skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@valuemartdc.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-22",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "ValueMart"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "202297"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



E-commerce Operations Manager Job at ValueMart




        
    

        
        Valuemart is a dynamic retail and hospitality company committed to delivering exceptional customer experiences through quality products, excellent service, and innovative business solutions. With operations spanning retail, bakery, restaurant, and café services, we pride ourselves on creating value for our customers, empowering our employees, and contributing positively to the communities we serve. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: E-commerce Operations Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Manage the end-to-end operations of the company's e-commerce platforms and online marketplaces.
	Oversee both front-end and back-end e-commerce operations, ensuring platform availability, functionality, and performance.
	Work closely with developers and third-party vendors on system enhancements, integrations, and troubleshooting.
	Manage integrations between the e-commerce platform, ERP, POS, Inventory Management System (IMS), Order Management System (OMS), payment gateways, and logistics partners.
	Monitor website performance, user experience, and system uptime, and recommend improvements.
	Lead order management, fulfilment, inventory synchronization, payment reconciliation, and returns management.
	Analyse operational and sales data to improve business performance and customer satisfaction.
	Develop and implement Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for e-commerce operations.
	Ensure data accuracy, cybersecurity best practices, and compliance with company policies.
	Lead, coach, and develop the e-commerce team to achieve operational and commercial objectives


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Information Technology, Computer Science, Supply Chain Management, Marketing, or a related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in e-commerce operations, with at least 2 years in a managerial or supervisory role.
	Proven experience managing end-to-end e-commerce operations, including order fulfilment, inventory management, customer experience, and marketplace operations.
	Hands-on experience managing e-commerce platforms such as Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, BigCommerce, or similar, including product uploads, catalogue management, pricing updates, promotions, and content management.
	Experience working with or supporting the integration of e-commerce platforms with ERP, POS, payment gateways, logistics providers, and inventory management systems.
	Good understanding of website content management and basic web technologies (HTML, CSS) and familiarity with APIs and system integrations. Knowledge of JavaScript or SQL is an added advantage but not required.
	Ability to work effectively with IT teams, software developers, and third-party vendors to implement, maintain, and enhance e-commerce solutions.
	Strong analytical skills with experience using reporting tools such as Google Analytics, Power BI, Excel, or similar.
	Excellent leadership, project management, communication, and problem-solving skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Customer Service Officer Job at ValueMart




        
    

        
        Valuemart is a dynamic retail and hospitality company committed to delivering exceptional customer experiences through quality products, excellent service, and innovative business solutions. With operations spanning retail, bakery, restaurant, and café services, we pride ourselves on creating value for our customers, empowering our employees, and contributing positively to the communities we serve. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Customer Service Officer

Job Location: Wuye, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Customer Service Officer serves as the primary point of contact for customers, ensuring exceptional service by addressing enquiries, resolving complaints, processing requests, and maintaining positive  customer relationships.
	The role is focused on enhancing customer satisfaction while supporting the company's sales and operational objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Attend to customer enquiries through phone calls, emails, social media, and walk-in visits.
	Resolve customer complaints promptly and professionally, escalating complex issues where necessary.
	Process customer orders, returns, exchanges, and service requests accurately.
	Provide customers with accurate information about products, services, pricing, and company policies.
	Maintain up-to-date customer records and interactions in the company's database.
	Follow up with customers to ensure issues have been resolved satisfactorily.
	Coordinate with the sales, warehouse, logistics, and other departments to ensure seamless service delivery.
	Monitor customer feedback and recommend improvements to enhance customer experience.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly customer service reports.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and service standards.
	Support customer retention initiatives by maintaining strong customer relationships.
	Perform other customer service-related duties as assigned.


Job Requirements


	Bachelor's degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, Mass Communication, or a related field.
	Minimum of 1–2 years of experience in customer service, front desk operations, or a similar role.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal and relationship management skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, and Outlook).
	Experience using Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is an added advantage.
	Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.
	Ability to multitask and work effectively under pressure.
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	High level of professionalism, patience, and empathy.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply

HR Manager Job at MICO Dairy Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        MICO Dairy Nigeria Limited is a registered food production company in Nigeria that specializes in manufacturing dairy-based snacks, children's breakfast cereals, and confectionery products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: HR Manager

Job Location: No. 6, Area 9, Olowotedo Village, opposite New Makun City, Obafemi-Owode L.G.A, Ogun

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Implement company HR policies.
	Manage the full recruitment cycle, internal transfers, and exit procedures.
	Oversee payroll, coordinate performance appraisals, and manage staff training.
	Resolve employee and labor relations issues.


Requirements:


	Education: B.Sc Degree or higher in Human Resource Management or related Management fields.
	Age: 30 – 39 years.
	Experience: Minimum of 5 years in HR; factory or manufacturing background is highly preferred.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] and copy [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquiries, contact: 08066126203 or 09057044873.
